MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Gerard Mendez, Esq. appeared for and with plaintiff Jayesh N. Patel. Limited Scope Attorney Sebastian Elan Kaplan-Sears appeared for and with defendant Harold Holmes

Settlement Conference Held. Case Settled. Parties sign off on Unlawful Detainer Stipulation for Entry of Judgment/Dismissal as to premises located at 905 Columbus Avenue, #235, San Francisco, California. See scanned document. Trial date vacated.

MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT HAROLD HOLMES' Motion To Quash Service Of Summons. There are no appearances in this matter. The Court vacates its tentative ruling, and Rules: No opposition filed, Motion Granted. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.
